_comment: Machine-readable benchmark corpus manifest (benchmark-plan-2026-06-30 Phase 1). Consolidates the fixture URLs/hashes from scripts/fetch-fixtures.sh and the per-case metadata from goldens/<name>/expected-findings.json + docs/DATASET.md into one manifest consumed by scripts/benchmark. Recall floor and expected findings live in goldens/<name>/expected-findings.json (not duplicated here to avoid drift). Evidence is NEVER committed: local cases resolve to a path already present under evidence/; large/gated images stage via <env_url>/<env_sha256> env vars through scripts/fetch-fixtures.sh. sha256 null = recorded on first pull (fixtures/sha256sums.txt); a gated big image should be pinned via its <env_sha256>. runnable_local:true means the evidence parses on the host with no SIFT microVM.

cases.name: nist-hacking-case
cases.note: Raw .dd parses locally (no SIFT). SCHARDT is in the golden set; treat a strong score as regression signal, not blind generalization.

mechanism_coverage.nhc-003: Deleted-email / free-space feature recovery (goldens/nist-hacking-case/expected-findings.json finding nhc-003, 'Outlook PST / free space carve') is now MECHANISM-SCOREABLE via the bulk_extract MCP tool (wraps bulk_extractor over the raw image's unallocated space), which closes the prior engine false-negative. NOT YET MEASURED here: an end-to-end recall delta needs BOTH the bulk_extractor binary AND a carving fixture with a recoverable deleted email; the tool + determinism/degradation are verified, the SCHARDT recall improvement is not asserted until scored.

cases.name: szechuan
cases.license: DFIR Madness - free for education (redistribute URL + hash, not the image)
cases.note: DFIR Madness Case 001: disk+memory+pcap across 2 hosts (~16GB), full public answer key. The best-fit multi-class fusion benchmark for VERDICT's corroboration-first design. Golden goldens/szechuan/expected-findings.json IS AUTHORED from the answer key (7 findings across log/network/disk/memory), but the case is HELD-OUT: runnable_local=false because it needs SIFT for the disk half and a ~16GB staged download, so VERDICT has not yet scored it. min_recall_percent in the golden is a placeholder floor to recalibrate after the first real scripts/benchmark run.
